message:
feat(routing): add cross-project issue routing with batched dispatch

Introduce RoutedIssueBatch and group_issue_inputs_by_route() to resolve
issue IDs across multiple beads directories (local and external projects).

Main dispatch changes:
- Route show/ready/blocked/count/list commands through storage context
  when available, falling back to standalone execution
- Rename execute_with_storage to execute_with_storage_ctx for show/ready
  to accept full StorageResult instead of just the storage handle
- Remove unused SqliteStorage import

Routing module:
- Add RoutedIssueBatch struct for grouping issues by resolved beads_dir
- Implement group_issue_inputs_by_route() preserving first-seen batch order
- Support symlink-following route resolution for monorepo setups

Tests:
- Add e2e_routing.rs with integration tests for route resolution and
  batched dispatch across local and external projects

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
